app.name: TestSuits
app.tagline: Modern test management for manual test suites.

notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.body: We couldn't find the page you were looking for. It might have been moved, renamed, or you might not have access to it anymore.

errors.network: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.server: The server hit an error. We've logged it — try again shortly.
errors.session_revoked: Your session has been revoked. Please sign in again.
errors.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.

auth.name: Name
auth.company_name_help: You'll become the first manager of this company. Add your team from the Team page afterwards.
auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your testing activity.
dashboard.no_upcoming_milestones: No milestones due in the next 30 days.
dashboard.no_failing_cases: No failures in the last 30 days.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group your test suites by product or component.
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create one to get started.

suites.no_cases: No test cases in this suite yet.

cases.title: Title
cases.requirements: Requirements (one per line — URL or ID)
cases.no_shared_steps: No shared steps in this project yet.

validation.step_expected_empty: Step {{step}}: expected result cannot be empty.

runs.title: Test Runs
runs.subtitle: Execute test cases and track results.
runs.select_case: Select a test case to execute.
runs.kanban_hint: Drag a card across columns to change a run's status.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.subtitle: Group test runs by release or iteration.

jira.title: Jira
jira.not_configured: Auto-creation is disabled. Configure Jira in Project Settings or link manually above.
jira.settings_subtitle: Configure how TestSuits files bugs in Jira for this project.
jira.parent_epic_help: If set, auto-created bugs will be nested under this epic. Leave empty to create stand-alone bugs.
jira.no_epics: No epics found in this Jira project.
jira.template_help: Templates support markdown (headings, lists, **bold**, *italic*, `code`) and these variables:
jira.markdown_note: Headings (## …), numbered lists (1. …) and bullet lists are rendered natively in Jira.
jira.company_level_hint: Credentials and bug templates are shared by every project in this company. Each project then picks which Jira project and optional epic it files bugs into.
jira.default_issue_type_help: Used for projects that don't set their own. Usually "Bug".
jira.project_binding_hint: Choose which Jira project this TestSuits project files bugs into, and optionally which epic those bugs should roll up under.
jira.need_company_config: Jira credentials aren't set yet for this company. Configure them in
jira.cannot_discover: Company Jira credentials are missing or disabled.

project.settings_subtitle: Pick which Jira project and optional parent epic new bugs will be filed into.

custom_fields.title: Custom fields
custom_fields.subtitle: Extra fields attached to every test case in this project.
custom_fields.empty: No custom fields yet. Add one to collect extra data on every case.
custom_fields.label: Label

validation.incomplete: Fix empty labels and select fields missing options before saving.

shared_steps.title: Shared steps
shared_steps.subtitle: A library of reusable steps you can drop into any test case.
shared_steps.name: Name
shared_steps.empty: No shared steps yet. Create one to reuse the same action across multiple cases.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: POST events to an external URL when things happen in this project.
webhooks.secret_help: If set, TestSuits signs the request body with HMAC-SHA256 and sends it as the x-testsuits-signature header.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Members of {{company}}. Managers see all work, testers see only their own.
team.invite_subtitle: Send an email invite. The teammate sets their own password from the link.
team.invite_sent: Invite created. Send them this link:

tokens.title: API tokens
tokens.subtitle: Personal access tokens for scripting and CI. Each token inherits your role and company.
tokens.name_help: Give this token a description so you can identify it later.
tokens.reveal_title: Copy your token now — it won't be shown again
tokens.reveal_help: Store it in a secrets manager or CI variable. Revoke anytime if it leaks.
tokens.empty: No tokens yet. Create one to call the API from scripts or CI.
tokens.revoke_confirm: Revoke this token? Anything using it will stop working immediately.

auth_reset.forgot_help: Enter your email. If it's in our system, we'll email you a reset link.
auth_reset.forgot_sent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth_reset.reset_help: Tokens expire after 1 hour. Pick a password you haven't used elsewhere.
auth_reset.reset_success: Password updated. You can now sign in.
auth_reset.reset_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth_reset.invite_help: Set a password to finish creating your account.
auth_reset.invite_success: Welcome aboard. You can now sign in.
auth_reset.invite_invalid: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Ask your manager to resend it.

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.subtitle: First-class requirements for this project — link them to cases to build a traceability matrix.
requirements.external_ref_help: URL or ID in your requirements system (Jira story, Confluence page, etc).
requirements.empty: No requirements yet for this project.
requirements.legacy_note: Legacy free-text requirements on this case are shown above. Pick a first-class requirement below to link it.

company.settings_subtitle: Jira integration and templates apply to every project in this company.

sso.title: SSO & Provisioning
sso.subtitle: Configure SAML single sign-on and SCIM user provisioning for this company.
sso.admin_only: Admin role required to view SSO settings.
sso.config_hint: Copy the IdP metadata from your identity provider (Okta, Azure AD, JumpCloud). The x509 certificate is used to verify SAML responses.
sso.scim_hint: Give your IdP a Bearer token to call /api/scim/v2. Tokens are shown once at creation — store them securely.
sso.token_shown_once: Copy this token now — it won't be shown again.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Tenant-wide activity stream for compliance review.
audit.empty: No audit entries match those filters.

matrix.title: Coverage matrix
matrix.subtitle: Latest result per case across a configuration dimension.
matrix.no_data: No executions yet — run some tests to populate the matrix.
matrix.pick_project: Select a project to view the matrix.

editor.link_prompt: Paste a URL (http, https, mailto or tel)
editor.link_rejected: That URL is not allowed. Only http, https, mailto and tel links are accepted.
